creator: ahd@kew.com
text:
FreeBSD disk allocation (fdisk replacement) should understand
	additional disk types.  This make editing a complicate disk
	more user friendly and less mistake prone.

	Two disks on my Compaq are:

		Decimal 18 (x'12') Compaq Diagnostic Partition
		Decinal 115 (x'73') SCO UnixWare

	 OS/2 Boot manager would be another common type if not
	 already defined, please send me mail (ahd@kew.com and I'll
	 look it up on another system).

Fix: 

Add specified types and descriptions to install boot editor.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install with multiple other partitions defined.
